column1: #   step        - integer; rows sharing a step number launch together
#   duration_ms - pulse width in ms  (PULSE / PULSE_TRAIN only; leave blank for OFF/DC)
#   count       - pulse count        (PULSE_TRAIN must be >= 2; leave blank for OFF/DC)
#   dwell_ms    - wait AFTER this step before the next one
#                 (only the last row per step number is used)
# CH3: stays DC (no change sent — not included in this step)
# Dwell 1000 ms to let the train finish before step 3
# CH1 and CH2: simultaneous 75 ms single pulses
# All three channels off at once; wait 200 ms
# CH2 and CH3: DC while CH1 pulses
# Dwell 2000 ms to allow the train to complete
# Final safe state: all channels off
